description:
Input model for read_file_and_parse activity.

Attributes:
    file_path: The file path to read and parse.
    default_content: A string to return if the file does not exist.
    strict: If True, raise an exception for unsupported file types.
           If False (default), return raw content for unsupported types.

file_path.description: The file path to read and parse
file_path.title: File Path

default_content.description: A string to return if the file does not exist
default_content.title: Default Content

strict.description: If True, raise exception for unsupported file types; if False, return raw content
strict.title: Strict

title: ReadFileAndParseInput
